query:
SELECT 'Dan Day' AS rep, p.id, p.name, p.location, p.actionTier, p.discoveryStatus,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') AS send_ready
FROM projects p
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND (p.projectState REGEXP 'SA|QLD|VIC|NSW|TAS' OR p.projectState IS NULL OR p.projectState = '' OR p.location REGEXP 'SA|QLD|VIC|NSW|TAS|National')
  AND (p.businessLines LIKE '%Pump%' OR p.businessLines LIKE '%Dewatering%' OR p.businessLines LIKE '%pump%')
ORDER BY
  CASE p.actionTier WHEN 'tier1_actionable' THEN 1 WHEN 'tier2_watch' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,
  CASE p.discoveryStatus WHEN 'send_ready_contact' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END
LIMIT 5;
